text.title: learning-speed-competitive-moat Failure Modes
text.summary: Migrated antipatterns for learning-speed-competitive-moat as failure modes. Add detector + repair clauses where missing.

failure-mode.description: Performance theater: PMs publish a "weekly insights" newsletter, count it as learning velocity, and never change a roadmap line.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Learning velocity is measured by decisions reversed or accelerated, not by document volume. The audit trail must show bet.md diffs, not newsletter archives.

failure-mode.description: Hero PM trap: all signals route through the most-learning PM, who becomes the bottleneck.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Personal learning velocity is not org learning velocity. PMs must explicitly delegate belief ownership to squad members so the loop is distributed, not individual.

failure-mode.description: Confirmation engine: PMs usually classify their own evidence. Without a peer or red-teamer, every event becomes "evidence for the belief I already had".
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The methodology is silent on this; PMs must build the social loop. Pair-review belief changes: every "kill" or "reframe" requires a peer PM or EM signoff.

failure-mode.description: Ritual stacking: Monday discovery, Tuesday roadmap, Wednesday competitor, Thursday OKRs, Friday retro — soon the PM is in rituals 4 days a week and never makes a decision.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Cap rituals at ≤2 hours/week of synchronous time. More than this crowds out user research and decision execution.

failure-mode.description: Calibration debt: PMs rarely grade their own past predictions, so personal confidence drifts. Without quarterly self-calibration, the "fast-learning PM" is just a fast-talking PM.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Quarterly personal calibration is non-optional. Run pm_learning_velocity.py on your own decisions. If you cannot, you have not been logging.

failure-mode.description: Cross-PM drift: in a multi-PM product, each PM's belief registry diverges; a customer hears three different stories.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The PM-Lead must enforce a shared belief schema even if individual beliefs differ. Read the org-wide beliefs.yaml weekly even if you do not own it.

failure-mode.description: Output-trained orgs: if # of features shipped is the PM's review metric, no amount of learning ritual changes incentives.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: The methodology requires the manager and skip-level to also be on learning velocity as a metric, otherwise it dies.

failure-mode.description: Discovery-debt accumulation: PMs who delegate signal collection to agents stop talking to users; their "fast learning" decays into "fast theorizing on stale data" within ~6 weeks.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a human-touched discovery floor (≥3 user conversations/week). Without it, the agent loop runs on stale truth.

failure-mode.description: Bet inflation: agents propose new bets on every signal cluster, producing 30 bets per PM that nobody can maintain.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Hard cap (e.g. 8 bets in flight per PM) enforced in the bet-reviewer prompt.

failure-mode.description: Citation laundering: an LLM cites the same Slack thread three times under three event_ids.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Dedupe by (channel, message_ts) before counting "independent" supports.

failure-mode.description: Premature kill on weekend lulls: agent runs Monday, sees zero events_for from the weekend, recommends kill.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always evaluate over a rolling 30-day window, not the last sprint.

failure-mode.description: Reframe loops: a bet that gets reframed every week is not learning, it is drifting.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Lint: reframes_in_last_quarter <= 1 per bet, otherwise flag for human strategy review.

failure-mode.description: Decision-log fabrication for promo: an LLM asked to "summarize my year for promo" will invent decisions you never made.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Use the log to verify the narrative; never let the agent author it.

failure-mode.description: Stale collector outputs leaking into bets: a competitor scrape returns a 2024 page; the agent dates it today.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Always preserve source_published_at and reject events older than the bet's check-back window.

failure-mode.description: PM tone homogenization: agents draft all bet updates in the same voice across all PMs in the org; execs notice.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Per-PM tone fingerprint or human-author the upward broadcasts.

failure-mode.description: Single-LLM monoculture: using one model family for collector + classifier + reviewer creates correlated errors.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: At least the reviewer should be a different model class than the classifier. Consider an alternative provider for the reviewer's red-team pass.

failure-mode.description: Privacy in user transcripts: PM bets often cite named customers; do not let the bet-reviewer ingest raw PII into a shared belief registry.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Strip PII at the classifier stage.

failure-mode.description: Auto-broadcasting kill decisions: an agent posts "we killed feature X" before sales, support, and partnership were notified.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force a 24-hour human-review delay on kill broadcasts; not on keep or accelerate.

failure-mode.description: Calibration as ritual instead of feedback: agent emits a calibration scorecard, PM glances and ignores.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Tie the scorecard to OKR review; otherwise it has no behavioral effect.

failure-mode.description: Rubric drift: if quarterly calibration suggests prompt-rubric updates and the PM rewrites the bet-reviewer prompt every quarter, comparability across quarters is lost.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Version the rubric; A/B-shadow new rubrics for one quarter before switching.

failure-mode.description: Discovery atrophy via agentification: tracking "events ingested" rises while "user conversations had" falls.
failure-mode.detector: TBD — observable signal that this antipattern is happening
failure-mode.repair: Force the dashboard to display both side-by-side; alert if conversations drop.
